title: Achilleon Skill
description: A single Taskclan Intelligence slash command with a fixed system prompt and tier binding. Lives at skills/{id}.yml.

id.description: Lowercase, hyphen-separated. Must match the filename (without .yml). 2-40 characters.

name.description: Display name — for skills, the slash-command form, e.g. /debug.

description.description: One-line description shown in the picker and gallery.

tier.description: Which T1 tier the skill runs on.

category.description: Category shown in the gallery + docs table.

hosts.description: Which Taskclan Intelligence surfaces the skill runs on. 'vscode' ships today; 'cli' and 'api' are reserved for future surfaces.

system.description: The system prompt. Tight, opinionated, no generic filler. Multi-line ok.

author.description: GitHub handle of the contributor. Defaults to 'taskclan' when omitted.

version.description: Semver. Defaults to 1.0.0. Bump on non-additive prompt changes.

examples.description: Optional short usage examples shown in docs.
